summary: Approved the bounded persona profile repository slice after Hermes addressed the significant review finding about swallowed storage errors. The implementation adds only data types/repository persistence and test-double compatibility; no provider, parser/OCR, frontend API, or remote changes were introduced.

findings.description: UpdatePersonaProfilesFromSegments is additive and not idempotent for replayed segment batches. This is acceptable for net-new segment batches in the current bounded slice, but should be revisited when wiring into pipeline replay/recovery.

accepted_changes: Added types.PersonaProfile with book/persona IDs, display name, voice description, segment count, and updated timestamp.
Extended book.Repository and StorageRepository with SavePersonaProfiles, GetPersonaProfiles, and UpdatePersonaProfilesFromSegments.
Persisted profiles at books/<bookID>/personas.json with per-book locking and deterministic persona ordering.
Added repository tests for save/get, missing profiles, invalid JSON, new merge, preservation of existing voice descriptions, and empty persona ID filtering.
Updated the hybrid pipeline repository test double to satisfy the augmented Repository interface.

security_review.notes: No secrets or remote changes introduced. Persona storage follows existing repository path pattern.

quality_review.notes: Static review passed. Go compile/tests are blocked in Hermes due missing go binary.

validation.notes: go binary not installed in Hermes environment
